description: Analysis population (valid outcome AND valid maternal age)
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(mat_age_val) & mat_age_val >= 10 yrs & mat_age_val <= 60 yrs

description: Analysis population with valid birthweight (LBW sample)
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(mat_age_val) & mat_age_val >= 10 yrs & mat_age_val <= 60 yrs AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg

normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(mat_age_val) & mat_age_val >= 10 yrs & mat_age_val <= 60 yrs AND NOT (is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg)

description: Analysis population with valid SGA classification
Filter_notes: normalise_outcome(neotreeoutcome) %in% c("Alive", "Neonatal Death") AND is.finite(mat_age_val) & mat_age_val >= 10 yrs & mat_age_val <= 60 yrs AND is.finite(bw_kg) & bw_kg >= 0.3 kg & bw_kg <= 7.0 kg AND !is.na(gestation) & gestation >= 24 wks & gestation <= 42 wks AND !is.na(sga_category)

description: Discarded for SGA (Missing both BW and GA)
